turf.00f57d29: You can't tell if this is real grass or just cheap plastic imitation.
turf.0171fffa: The symbol of the Terran Government.
turf.023ab74a: The linear induction plate that powers the tram. It is currently energized.
turf.03baebfd: Go on. Step in it. Maybe you'll be like some sort of Lava based Jesus.
turf.0493d687: The armored hull of an ominous looking ship.
turf.05d00551: The carved surface of a dusty tomb. It's not clear who built this.
turf.0688f668: A comfortable, warm tempature eminates from these - followed immediately after by toxic chemicals in liquid or gaseous forms; but warmth all the same!
turf.06c9c905: A wall with plasma plating. This is definitely a bad idea.
turf.0aa6efcf: Thin, fragile flooring created with metal foam. Designed to be easily replacable by tiling when applied to in a combat stance.
turf.0b3ae3e9: Cobbled stone that makes a permanent pathway. A bit old-fashioned.
turf.0d29034d: A rubbery mat with a inset pattern of lime phosphorescent dye.
turf.0d70b30c: A natural body of water kept warm by geothermal activity.
turf.0fd0a0b4: A wall covered in a thick sheet of ice.
turf.108d65bb: \"This is a plaque in honour of our comrades on the G4407 Stations. Hopefully TG4407 model can live up to your fame and fortune.\" Scratched in beneath that is a crude image of a meteor and a spaceman. The spaceman is laughing. The meteor is exploding.
turf.10c551d0: Acts as the bottom of the shuttle, if this isn't here the shuttle floor is broken through.
turf.11f0e3fb: If you see this, and you're not a ghost, yell at coders
turf.12c7c1ad: Seems to be stronger than the other rocks in the area. Only a master of mining techniques could destroy this.
turf.1310903e: Only a more advanced species could break a rock such as this one!
turf.14dc5dfd: A wall with bananium plating. Honk!
turf.1517d82d: A huge chunk of reinforced metal used to separate rooms. Effectively impervious to conventional methods of destruction.
turf.16583bdc: A reinforced titanium wall with additional plating resistant to anomalous energy.
turf.169776c0: A huge chunk of iron used to separate rooms.
turf.16c487d0: You fix some dents on the broken plating.
turf.1826fe4f: It looks like base turfs went to the fucking moon, TELL YOUR LOCAL CODER TODAY
turf.18867f75: A huge chunk of reinforced metal used to separate rooms. Naturally, to cut down on costs, this is just a really good paint job to resemble titanium. Effectively impervious to conventional methods of destruction.
turf.18e8e310: If you can't escape sandstorms underwater, is anywhere safe?
turf.1bdf2b6d: A rubbery mat with a inset pattern of blue phosphorescent dye.
turf.1be1e8c9: You think entering this water would probably go extremely badly.
turf.1c0ba03a: A white, empty void, quite unlike anything you've seen before.
turf.1cdd7f34: Gives the impression you can walk on water. Chaplains love it.
turf.1f19b004: You heard this place was dirty, but this is just absurd.
turf.215f885b: It's coarse and rough and gets everywhere.
turf.21d17c6d: A huge chunk of bronze, decorated like gears and cogs.
turf.21ddba26: A wall made of solid stone bricks.
turf.221bb665: Sadly, these don't seem to make you faster...
turf.2346de48: A wired glass tile embedded into the floor. Modify the color with a Multitool.
turf.236268e2: You need one rod to build a heatproof lattice.
turf.2413a0eb: Blocks of stone arranged in a tile-like pattern, odd, really, how it looks like real stone too, because it is!
turf.243ab6c3: Rough volcanic floor that can be dug up for basalt.
turf.24bed445: Well, the flow of time is normal on these tiles, weird.
turf.250fc38e: A simple but beautiful path made of various sized stones.
turf.26167120: Soft velvet carpeting. Feels good between your toes.
turf.2b8f530c: need a floor tile to build!
turf.2bf23093: The air about this floor seems.. different?
turf.2c547cf1: A wall with a bamboo finish.
turf.2cf61729: You peek through the door's bluespace peephole...
turf.30553517: A natural body of shallow water.
turf.309c1127: The air smells strange over this sinister flooring.
turf.30e12ae0: A rubbery mat with a inset pattern of violet phosphorescent dye.
turf.320ce4fe: Use a multitool on it to change colors.
turf.338c9e08: Extremely densely-packed sheets of ice and rock, forged over the years of the harsh cold.
turf.33ab6e62: You feel as if you are looking out at an impossibly large horizion, in the distance you can see marble white pillars in a formal and organizied pattern and they go up, and up, and up until the point where you have to look almost straight up to see some of the ones closest to you, and looking down the hallway you can see onto further than you thought a mere mortal could.
turf.340b3580: You could probably make this plating more resilient with some plasteel.
turf.344dcc09: A wall with uranium plating. This is probably a bad idea.
turf.348d6a27: You can screw it to hide the contents beneath.
turf.37831dee: The reinforcement rods are wrenched firmly in place.
turf.3d20e8d0: A wall with tough iron plating.
turf.3f3b758a: There's nothing at the bottom. Absolutely nothing.
turf.3fa870fd: You could adjust its corners with a wrench.
turf.3fbc0709: You might be able to build ontop of it with some tiles...
turf.404b553d: You forcefully pry off the planks, destroying them in the process.
turf.40a6b861: Tall rustling stalks form an impenetrable wall of corn.
turf.41fe1fe4: There is already a catwalk here!
turf.4338d5d7: Time seems to flow very slowly around these tiles.
turf.436b290c: It's really cozy! Great for soft paws!
turf.450550db: A rubbery mat with a inset pattern of purple phosphorescent dye.
turf.45074d5e: A flowing stream of chilled liquid plasma. You probably shouldn't get in.
turf.4a28973f: The floor you walk on. It looks near-impervious to damage.
turf.4b7d168c: A rubbery mat with a inset pattern of cyan phosphorescent dye.
turf.4d4c2b22: This is a fishing spot. You can look again to list its fishes...
turf.4facaaad: Less shallow, very dangerous water. You feel like it would be a very bad idea to enter this water.
turf.51ef75fb: You push the wall but nothing happens!
turf.53a2f7b9: Shallow water. It somehow reminds you of lizardfolk.
turf.53d17d85: Sturdy interior hull plating that separates you from the floor below.
turf.5415cbef: You can unscrew it to reveal the contents beneath.
turf.54d9d9f4: The armored hull of an ominous looking ship, with special plating resistant to anomalous energy.
turf.54dd6e0c: Sturdy exterior hull plating that separates you from the outside world
turf.561abe3a: A wall layered with impenetrable sheets of paper.
turf.5630fb8c: A luxurious wall made out of a plasma-platinum alloy. Effectively impervious to conventional methods of destruction.
turf.580d9d52: A wall with gold plating. Swag!
turf.59e7a965: An easily-compressible wall used for temporary shelter.
turf.5ae0402d: An extremely densely-packed rock, most mining tools or explosives would never get through this.
turf.5b7fa725: A solidly wooden wall. It's a bit weaker than a wall made with metal.
turf.5c447ac1: You don't have enough {0} to fill the hole.
turf.5cea176f: The light bulb seems fine, no need to replace it.
turf.5dbc7e9f: A wall with rough iron plating.
turf.5dc62f73: A conservatively built metal frame with plastic paneling covering a thin air-seal layer. It's a little unnerving, but it's better than nothing at all.
turf.60bba328: A rubbery mat with a inset pattern of red phosphorescent dye.
turf.64588cb2: Safely recreated turf for your hellplanet-scaping.
turf.660a6b98: You need two rods to build a catwalk!
turf.67db05d8: A huge chunk of dense, packed meat. Effectively impervious to conventional methods of destruction.
turf.6a034812: Space-looking floor. Thankfully, the deadly aspects of space are not emulated here.
turf.6cd6f350: Somehow, it is not melting under these conditions. Must be some very thick ice. Just as slippery too.
turf.6d486f96: For horses and cows like you.
turf.6d76135f: A floor made of invulnerable notebook paper.
turf.6da94144: The puffy snow clumps together to make a solid-looking floor, though it sinks beneath your feet.
turf.6e2462b9: Polished over centuries of undersea weather conditions and a distinct lack of light.
turf.72cd2069: Odd, really, how it looks exactly like the iron walls yet is stone instead of iron. Now, if that's really more of a complaint aboutthe ironness of walls or the stoneness of the floors, that's really up to you. But have you really ever seen iron that dull? I mean, itmakes sense for the station to have dull metal walls but we're talking how a rudimentary iron wall would be. Medieval ages didn't evenuse iron walls, iron walls are actually not even something that exists because iron is an expensive and not-so-great thing to build wallsout of. It only makes sense in the context of space because you're trying to keep a freezing vacuum out. Is anyone following me on this? The idea of a \"rudimentary\" iron wall makes no sense at all! Is anything i'm even saying here true? Someone's gotta fact check this!
turf.7584a817: Do jump on it, it can take it.
turf.7908efb1: A collection of various dried greens, not so green anymore, that makes a passable roof material.
turf.79247d20: Looking at the luscious field, you suddenly feel homesick.
turf.7cf17838: The rock seems to be too strong to destroy. Maybe I can break it once I become a master miner.
turf.7d8acec2: Studies by the Nanotrasen Materials Safety Division have not yet determined if this is safe to jump on, do so at your own risk.
turf.7ea0f690: A wall with sandstone plating. Rough.
turf.7ecb76e2: The water's great, but the immediate area seems completely devoid of fish...
turf.80e5f6ff: Extremely sturdy interior hull plating that separates you from the floor below.
turf.8197e5bf: Repair the plating first! Use a welding tool or a plating repair tool to fix the damage.
turf.81e8e7ee: What is this, light-speed? We need to go to plaid speed!
turf.82d037f6: Extremely sturdy exterior hull plating that separates you from the uncaring vacuum of space.
turf.8387bc27: A rubbery mat with a inset pattern of white phosphorescent dye.
turf.84f9b10b: A tiled floor made out of an odd pale stone, inscribed with odd runes.
turf.853e8530: You begin fixing dents on the wall...
turf.8594469b: A section of heated plating, helps keep the snow from stacking up too high.
turf.85f913ec: A rubbery pad inset with a phosphorescent pattern.
turf.89b9417b: The surrounding enviroment is so dark you can hardly see yourself.
turf.8b06819e: Something about this grass makes you want to frolic. Or get high.
turf.8f21bd8a: Smooth tile with extra reinforcement. Secured firmly to the floor to prevent tampering.
turf.8fd6cce6: A cold stone wall engraved with indecipherable symbols. Studying them causes your head to pound.
turf.938aedf9: A rubbery mat with a inset pattern of pink phosphorescent dye.
turf.95fcc7fc: Pretty snow! It's not too cold.
turf.962e61a0: An extra durable wall made of an alloy of plasma and titanium, reinforced with plasteel rods.
turf.9746b9b2: You could use a {0} or a {1} to dig a fishing hole here.
turf.974b8908: Tide's high tonight. Charge your batons.
turf.982784a6: This rock is filled with pockets of breathable air. It has metal struts to protect it from mining.
turf.985a8157: A rubbery mat with a inset pattern of black phosphorescent dye.
turf.993821fe: A rubbery mat with a inset pattern of yellow phosphorescent dye.
turf.99ed8514: The plate can be repaired using a {0}.
turf.9b8a136b: Marker for z-level baseturf, usually resolves to space.
turf.9d797ce8: A rubbery mat with a inset pattern of teal phosphorescent dye.
turf.9da4dd03: An extremely densely-packed rock, sheeted over with centuries worth of ice and snow.
turf.9dbde708: A thick, seemingly indestructible stone wall.
turf.9e02a2b9: Is it marble, polished to a mirror finish? Or just really, really grippy ice?
turf.a0f50ec9: A wall with wooden plating. Stiff.
turf.a2dacc24: You feel a strange nostalgia from looking at this...
turf.a4de212c: A wall made of unusually solid stone bricks.
turf.a536c411: Repair the plating first! Use a welding tool to fix the damage.
turf.a7c285e4: There's a few screws and a small crack visible.
turf.a81db8cf: A glow-in-the-dark floor used to test emissive turfs.
turf.a826ddd9: A wall designed to protect the security of the hotel's guests.
turf.a9e3c8c0: too damaged, use a welding or plating repair tool!
turf.aa296c47: A rubbery mat with a inset pattern of green phosphorescent dye.
turf.aad7711b: A section of the earth given way to form a natural aqueduct.
turf.b04ce71e: Use a screwdriver to turn it off or on.
turf.b06a9ac4: The sand crunches beneath your feet, though it feels soft to the touch.
turf.b0723366: There are a few attachment holes for a new tile or reinforcement rods.
turf.b09e6b05: A wall with diamond plating. You monster.
turf.b31b47fb: Looks painful to step in. Don't mine down.
turf.b4b46010: too damaged, use a welding tool!
turf.b5e0870c: A sheet of solid ice. Looks slippery.
turf.b6196d94: This is better than a vacation, since you're still getting paid.
turf.b883e801: A wall penning in the sheep amongst the wolves. It glows with malevolent energy - prodding it is likely unwise.
turf.bb4ba1b2: Don't jump on it, or do, I'm not your mom.
turf.bd1ef6d9: A mysterious hole appears out of nowhere!
turf.be2b63e2: This rock is filled with pockets of breathable air.
turf.be8d951f: A huge chunk of material used to separate rooms.
turf.be9b7f09: The chain reaction stopped! The gibtonite had {0} reactions left till the explosion!
turf.bfd46e14: You recognise the footprints as belonging to:
turf.c14a0138: Water kept warm through some unknown heat source, possibly a geothermal heat source far underground. Whatever it is, it feels pretty damn nice to swim, and you can even catch a glimpse of the odd fish darting through the water.
turf.c513469e: Hey look, it's the inside of a greytiders mind!
turf.c5e4a976: A wall made out of strange stone, runes on its sides pulsating in a rythmic pattern.
turf.c6b262f9: You begin slicing through the outer plating...
turf.c6f5caf3: A tiled floor made out of an odd pale stone.
turf.c9f2f2eb: A wall made of densely packed snow blocks.
turf.cbbf7f50: A huge chunk of reinforced metal used to separate rooms.
turf.cdddcdad: Reinforced paper walling. Someone really doesn't want you to leave.
turf.cf1ea3f8: Water kept warm through some unknown heat source, possibly a geothermal heat source far underground. Whatever it is, it feels pretty damn nice to swim in given the rest of the environment around here, and you can even catch a glimpse of the odd fish darting through the water.
turf.cf855a08: A bamboo mat with a decorative trim.
turf.d17c89ba: Do jump on it, jump on it while in a mecha, it can take it.
turf.d17d2ea6: Effectively impervious to conventional methods of destruction.
turf.d5f505cf: There is already a lattice here!
turf.d79aa164: A tile in a pure white color.
turf.d7de1db3: A collection of various dried greens, not so green anymore, that makes a passable floor material
turf.da439c39: A clever illusion designed to look like a bottomless pit.
turf.dae4ff0f: A light-weight titanium wall used in shuttles.
turf.db10fb49: It looks like the dents could be welded smooth.
turf.db8b54c2: Through a series of micro-teleports these tiles let people move at incredible speeds.
turf.dc11afad: tear in the fabric of reality
turf.dc2699a9: A wall with alien alloy plating.
turf.dd664628: Acts as the bottom of a stack of baseturfs affected by a trapdoor.
turf.dd6e2b03: There is no transport frame to attach the anchor!
turf.dda8745a: The linear induction plate that powers the tram.
turf.e060f41c: It has metal struts that need to be welded away before it can be mined.
turf.e0969443: Looks complex. You can see the circuits running through the floor.
turf.e0a1d63a: You reinforce the foamed plating with tiling.
turf.e23d19f0: It turns out grass doesn't grow very well in hell.
turf.e2aa88a3: Sturdy exterior hull plating that separates you from the outside world.
turf.e2b2c89e: You still feel hot, despite the cool walls of the holodeck.
turf.e580b6e4: There's gibtonite inside! It's going to explode!
turf.e5c1c1bb: A cold metal wall engraved with indecipherable symbols. Studying them causes your head to pound.
turf.e65915b5: Sturdy exterior hull plating that separates you from the uncaring vacuum of space.
turf.e7463f16: It looks damaged and the electrical components exposed!
turf.e7717209: A cold metal wall engraved with indecipherable symbols. Studying them causes your head to pound. Effectively impervious to conventional methods of destruction.
turf.e7e4c723: Upon closer examination, it's still dirt.
turf.e8ba50af: You don't have the dexterity to do this!
turf.ead6f3f5: Stylish dark wood with extra reinforcement. Secured firmly to the floor to prevent tampering.
turf.eb7854e9: Flooring that shows its contents underneath. Engineers love it!
turf.ebacf890: Gives the impression of moving at hyper-speed, without moving. May induce motion sickness.
turf.edd9f40e: It shakes a bit when you step, but lets you cross between sides quickly!
turf.ee08a98d: A rubbery mat with a inset pattern of orange phosphorescent dye.
turf.eeca48f9: A wall with silver plating. Shiny!
turf.eee0a053: Thick, tough flooring created with multiple layers of metal.
turf.f0a29a5e: It's cool to the touch, pleasantly so.
turf.f0c63713: You fix some dents on the wall.
turf.f3f63b4c: The attachment points are all bent to uselessness, looks nigh-impervious to damage.
turf.f412a4e2: Cold stone walls. It's like a dungeon.
turf.f67b58a5: The wall repels you with tremendous force!
turf.f6a65fbc: You need two rods to make a reinforced floor!
turf.f6f0c15b: Hard-packed dirt - much too hard to plant seeds in.
turf.f86d5448: The reinforcement bolts are {0} firmly in place. Use a {1} to remove the plate.
turf.f965e08f: The door seems to be malfunctioning and refuses to operate!
turf.fa16bff3: The ground is covered in volcanic ash.
turf.fb237112: Drats! Your vision is too poor to use this!
turf.fc15a7c5: A durable wall made of an alloy of plasma and titanium.
turf.fc246901: Don't jump off, unless you want to fall a really long distance.
turf.fece6de1: Melted down oil can, in some cases, be used to pave road surfaces.
turf.ff0f6921: You need one rod to build a lattice.
turf.ff9d66d1: There's a small crack on the edge of it.
